case_title: ISMAEL OSTOLAZA VS. ANA LAURA PEREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ISMAEL OSTOLAZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANA LAURA PEREZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER LOUISE FUENTES. DEFENDANT CEASAR GARCIA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER LOUISE FUENTES. THE NON-CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY CLERK R.SAHATJIAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSTOLAZA, ISMAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, ANA LAURA $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,175.00, DEFENDANT CEASAR GARCIA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $100.00) SERVED MAR-27-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CESAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2019 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO MAY-29-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ISMAEL OSTOLAZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANA LAURA PEREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CESAR GARCIA IS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANTS REQUEST A TRANSLATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OSTOLAZA, ISMAEL AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, ANA LAURA GARCIA, CESAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINANCE FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, ANA LAURA GARCIA, CESAR
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
